page: Amazon Web Services r7iz.12xlarge is a memory-optimized server instance powered by the Nitro hypervisor. It features 48 dedicated vCPUs based on 24 physical cores of an Intel Xeon 6455B processor with an x86_64 architecture. The CPU operates at a clock speed of 3.9 GHz and includes 60 MB of L3 cache. It supports advanced instruction sets such as AVX-512 and Intel Advanced Matrix Extensions (AMX) for accelerated matrix multiplication.

The instance is equipped with 384.0 GB of high-speed DDR5 memory operating at 5 GHz, providing 8.0 GB of RAM per vCPU. It does not include local NVMe storage or bundled GPUs, relying entirely on network-attached storage. Network connectivity is delivered via a baseline bandwidth of 25 Gbps. No complimentary public IPv4 addresses are included with this instance.

In benchmark testing, the r7iz.12xlarge demonstrates strong memory bandwidth, reaching 244.1 GB/sec for large-block read operations and 106.8 GB/sec for write operations. Single-core performance is notable, with a Geekbench single-core score of 2278.0, placing it in the top tier. It also shows strong capability in database operations, achieving 65.52 million operations per second in Redis SET tests and a Passmark database score of 26029.38. These characteristics make the instance highly suitable for memory-intensive workloads, relational databases, enterprise applications, and memory-cached data stores.
description: Amazon Web Services r7iz.12xlarge is a memory-optimized server instance featuring 48 dedicated vCPUs powered by a 3.9 GHz Intel Xeon 6455B processor. Built on the Nitro hypervisor, it provides 384.0 GB of DDR5 memory running at 5 GHz, translating to 8.0 GB of RAM per vCPU. The architecture supports advanced instruction sets including AVX-512 and Intel Advanced Matrix Extensions (AMX). This instance does not include local storage or GPUs, relying on network-attached storage and offering a 25 Gbps baseline network bandwidth. Benchmark results show top-tier single-core performance and strong memory bandwidth, with large-block reads reaching 244.1 GB/sec. The r7iz.12xlarge is highly suited for memory-intensive applications, relational databases, and high-throughput caching layers like Redis.
og_description: Amazon Web Services r7iz.12xlarge is a memory-optimized instance with 48 dedicated vCPUs, 384 GB of DDR5 RAM, and a 3.9 GHz Intel Xeon CPU, designed for high-throughput database and memory-intensive workloads.
meta_description: Amazon Web Services r7iz.12xlarge is a memory-optimized instance featuring 48 dedicated vCPUs, 384 GB of DDR5 RAM, and a 3.9 GHz Intel Xeon processor.
tagline: A memory-optimized x86_64 platform featuring high-frequency Intel Xeon processors and DDR5 memory for demanding database and caching workloads.
bullet_points: 48 dedicated vCPUs powered by a 3.9 GHz Intel Xeon 6455B processor
384.0 GB of high-speed 5 GHz DDR5 memory
Intel AMX and AVX-512 instruction set support for accelerated workloads
25 Gbps baseline network bandwidth with Nitro hypervisor integration
Optimized for relational databases, Redis caching, and memory-intensive enterprise applications
